description: Configure a new Azure Active Directory tenant for auditing in ManageEngine ADAudit Plus (http://localhost:8081) using the credentials 'admin' and 'Admin@2024'. Add the tenant 'northwindtraders.onmicrosoft.com' with Application (Client) ID 'd87c3e2a-4f5b-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f' and Client Secret 'N7~3_X9.V-P2~kM5~jR8_wL4.qT1~sZ6'. Ensure the configuration is saved, noting that connection validation may fail in this test environment.
